stemHtml: A typical radio altimeter installation consists of…

options.a: three antennas placed longitudinally: one for transmission and two redundant receive antennas.
options.b: one antenna that is alternately transmitting and receiving radio pulses.
options.c: four antennas: two longitudinal and two lateral antennas that use Doppler techniques.
options.d: two antennas: one continuously transmitting and the other continuously receiving a radio signal.
